subject: SOL
observation: SOL is still holding above the prior breakout area and has not yet lost the local higher-low structure.
evidence: Spot volume expanded on the rebound, perp positioning stayed controlled, and the current narrative flow still supports continuation.
risk: A clean loss of the breakout shelf or a rapid leverage-led rejection would invalidate the setup.
next_step: Re-check whether relative strength persists into the next major session and whether funding stays constructive.

pain_log.missing_question: I still cannot compare the current structure cleanly to the last three multi-week breakouts.
pain_log.notes: If this gap repeats across several thesis cycles, add one external historical-data API instead of widening the realtime system.
